_publications._publicationTitle: Using antisense oligonucleotides for the physiological modulation of the alternative splicing of NF1 exon 23a during PC12 neuronal differentiation.

_contextSnippet: In the presence of PMO-SkpE23a, the levels of P-PKA α/β were higher upon NGF treatment than in NGF-treated PC12 cells alone
details: Successfully detected increased P-PKA α/β levels in PC12 cells upon NGF treatment with PMO-SkpE23a at 1ug/ml concentration
